testcase.name: test_session_status_has_pairing_fields

failure.message: AssertionError: pairing_code missing: {'id': '90658e21-2e8d-4b7d-932f-db7a45e8268a', 'user_id': '999b11d2-3c74-4f91-9119-794696f9550e', 'name': 'iter5 pair sess', 'phone': None, 'status': 'qr', 'default_country_code': '', 'auto_prefix': False, 'receive_messages': True, 'mark_as_seen': False, 'created_at': '2026-04-28T10:02:23.859529+00:00', 'qr': 'data:image/png;base64,'} assert 'pairing_code' in {'auto_prefix': False, 'created_at': '2026-04-28T10:02:23.859529+00:00', 'default_country_code': '', 'id': '90658e21-2e8d-4b7d-932f-db7a45e8268a', ...}

testcase.failure: E AssertionError: pairing_code missing: {'id': '90658e21-2e8d-4b7d-932f-db7a45e8268a', 'user_id': '999b11d2-3c74-4f91-9119-794696f9550e', 'name': 'iter5 pair sess', 'phone': None, 'status': 'qr', 'default_country_code': '', 'auto_prefix': False, 'receive_messages': True, 'mark_as_seen': False, 'created_at': '2026-04-28T10:02:23.859529+00:00', 'qr': 'data:image/png;base64,'} assert 'pairing_code' in {'auto_prefix': False, 'created_at': '2026-04-28T10:02:23.859529+00:00', 'default_country_code': '', 'id': '90658e21-2e8d-4b7d-932f-db7a45e8268a', ...}
